notes: v360 — CLEARER REPORT CARD (two things you flagged). (1) SINGLE signals are now rated out of 10 too — each single flag's card shows its Strength score right next to the 'beat the market / did NOT beat' verdict, so everything is rated, not just the combos. (2) Fixed the confusing 'PROMISING but 1.8/10' rows. The badge and the score measure DIFFERENT things: the badge (SOLID / PROMISING / TOO EARLY) is only how well-TESTED a signal is — how many times it fired — not whether it worked. The /10 is the actual verdict: tested AND working. So a well-tested signal whose edge is negative (it didn't beat the market) now shows a red 'NO EDGE' tag on the ladder instead of a misleading 'PROMISING' badge — now the badge and the score agree. That's why two lines that were both 'PROMISING' could read 5/10 and 1.8/10: one worked, one didn't. The '📖 How to read this card' guide now spells this out. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v360. ALSO RECENT — v359 the report card rates out of 10; v358 signal tiles on the Market Radar. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
